currentFocus: Repo-quality hash closeout is accepted and the public-candidate/curated-export wording classification is closed with no docs edit needed; the next baton is read-first public-main and state verification.

publicMain.nextWriteRequirement: Re-read live git truth before treating any exact main commit as current.

currentTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo remains the primary collaboration repo for source, docs, tools, tests, RE notes, wave notes, state batons, agent reports, readiness notes, and compact proof summaries that are non-secret and non-payload.
currentTruth.wordingClassification: No clearly stale non-validation public-candidate or curated-export wording requiring a docs edit was found.
currentTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release was built, published, signed, pushed as a package, or announced.
currentTruth.claimBoundary: State refresh and next-baton docs only; no product source, product tests, package scripts, patch catalogs, release artifacts, AppCore, WinUI, CLI, runtime/proof scripts, Ghidra content, game files, installed game folder, original BEA.exe, runtime behavior, patch semantics, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, Host/Join capability, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference claim, release publication, Ghidra mutation, hard-payload boundary, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation changed.
currentTruth.productBaseline: WinUI 3 remains the primary app, AppCore remains shared correctness logic, the C# CLI remains a support lane, and Python tooling remains repo/lab support.

runtimeBoundaries.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint and source-bound copied-runtime proof exists
runtimeBoundaries.staticReClosure: static closure is not runtime, gameplay, visual, online, rebuild, or parity proof

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, and local runtime caches stay out of git and release ZIPs; use LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md for local-only placement.

activeSlice.name: post-wording-repo-quality-state-verification
activeSlice.goal: from clean main, confirm live git truth and state baton alignment before any write; make only a small docs/state baton correction if drift is proven, otherwise report no change
activeSlice.claimBoundary: docs/state verification only; no package script, product code, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA claim changes

validation.currentStateRefresh: Validate with JSON parsing, stale-reference scan, docs/repo hygiene gates, public allowlist, hard-payload safety, and git diff checks.
validation.nextSlice: Use docs/state gates for documentation-only cleanup and add the relevant WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any code or UI behavior change.

nextSteps: Start from clean main and verify HEAD, origin/main, and live remote refs/heads/main before writing.
Re-read goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, documentation_agent_state.json, and re_orchestrator_state.json; confirm no stale consolidated-main hash references remain.
Treat the public-candidate/curated-export wording classification as no-op evidence unless a new concrete stale claim is proven.
Keep package scripts, product behavior, patch rows, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, music, online gates, runtime proof, release packaging, and installed-game mutation rules out of scope.
